text.title: Chunking Document Structure — Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for a document-structure chunk: id, text, header_path, section_id, token_count, source, strategy, version.

list.item: header_path — joined ancestor titles or empty string if root-level.

antipattern.description: header_path missing on sub-chunks of a long section.
antipattern.reason: Violates r1-header-path-propagate; sub-chunks lose navigational anchor.

antipattern.description: strategy==html with chunks containing un-decoded HTML entities.
antipattern.reason: BeautifulSoup was not used to extract text; downstream embeddings see raw &.

example.code: { "id": "b1c2d3e4f5a6978800112233445566aa", "text": "# Authentication > Tokens\nRefresh tokens are short-lived JWTs signed by HS256.", "header_path": "Authentication > Tokens", "section_id": "authentication-tokens", "token_count": 28, "source": "docs/auth.md", "strategy": "markdown", "version": "1.0.0", "part_index": null }

example.note: Invalid: strategy not in enum; missing id/header_path/source/version/token_count.

list.item: header_path present (may be empty string for root).
